title: Teleport Fix
description: This mod enhances teleportation by adding customizable visual effects and sounds that can be selected by color.
body:
## **About**
This mod was created to make teleportation more realistic, since it's magic and should be accompanied by effects. Eight colors have been added to choose from, each with its own particle effects and sounds. Also, you will bring a player or entity with you if you touch them. To select a color, press the "U" key.
## IMPORTANT! Make sure you are using Forge 47.4.0 for 1.20.1
